zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster於1354年11月6日出生在英國維爾爾瓦明斯特時，她的父親Sir Thomas de Mauduit20歲，母親Lady Joan Bassingbourne20歲。她於1371年與Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton在英國諾薩普頓史爾洛維其可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1404年在英國諾薩普頓史爾洛維其可享年50歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster于1354年11月6日出生在英国維爾爾瓦明斯特时，她的父亲Sir Thomas de Mauduit20岁，母亲Lady Joan Bassingbourne20岁。她于1371年与Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton在英国諾薩普頓史爾洛維其可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1404年在英国諾薩普頓史爾洛維其可享年50岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托。

nameMeanings.name: de

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mauduit

variants.name: Mawditt
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French mal-duit ‘badly brought up, ill educated’ (Latin male doctus).

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster was born on 6 November 1354, in Warminster, Wiltshire, England, her father, Sir Thomas de Mauduit, was 20 and her mother, Lady Joan Bassingbourne, was 20. She married Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton in 1371, in Lowick, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1404, in Lowick, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster est née le 6 novembre 1354, à Warminster, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas de Mauduit, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Bassingbourne, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton en 1371, à Lowick, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1404, à Lowick, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Bristol, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster am 6. November 1354 in Warminster, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas de Mauduit 20 und ihre Mutter Lady Joan Bassingbourne 20. Sie hat 1371 in Lowick, Northamptonshire, England Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1404 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Lowick, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster è nata il il 6 novembre 1354 nel Warminster, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas de Mauduit, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Lady Joan Bassingbourne, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton nel 1371, nel Lowick, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1404, nel Lowick, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Bristol, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminsterが1354年11月6日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアワーミンスターで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Mauduitは20歳，母Lady Joan Bassingbourneは20歳であった。1371年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアロウィックでSir Henry de Grene of Draytonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1404年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアロウィックで50歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster(이)가 1354년 11월 6일 영국 윌츠히르 워민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Mauduit(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joan Bassingbourne(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1371년 영국 노르섬프토실르 로이c크에서 Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1404년 영국 노르섬프토실르 로이c크에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster nasceu em 6 de novembro de 1354, em Warminster, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Mauduit, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan Bassingbourne, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton em 1371, em Lowick, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1404, em Lowick, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster родилась 6 ноября 1354 г. в местности варминстир, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Mauduit было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Bassingbourne, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton в 1371 г. в местности лоуикк, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1404 г. в местности лоуикк, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности бристол, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster nació el 6 de noviembre de 1354, en Warminster, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas de Mauduit, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lady Joan Bassingbourne, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton en 1371, en Lowick, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1404, en Lowick, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
